hooks.command: command -v llmw >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv tool install -q "git+https://github.com/duddudcns/llm-wiki-cli.git" || pip install -q --user "git+https://github.com/duddudcns/llm-wiki-cli.git"; }; llmw hook session-start 2>/dev/null || true
payload=$(cat); case "$payload" in *wiki*|*raw*) printf '%s' "$payload" | llmw hook pretooluse 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
